news-global-econ.title: Ambani flags ‘unprecedented dislocation’ as Reliance net slips
news-global-econ.description: Billionaire Mukesh Ambani flagged the “unprecedented dislocation” unleashed by the US-Iran war after Reliance Industries Ltd.’s quarterly profit slipped but managed to meet analyst expectations due to a strong show by its consumer units.

news-global-econ.description: A California couple is suing Los Angeles after the city designated Marilyn Monroe's former home a historic monument, blocking their demolition plans.

news-global-econ.description: President says the Federal Reserve investigation is "not dropped" and vows to find out why costs went above budget for the project.

news-global-soc.title: Two Police Officers Shot at Chicago's Swedish Hospital
news-global-soc.description:
Two police officers were shot Saturday morning at the Swedish Hospital in Chicago's Ravenswood neighborhood.
